current_turn_information: I mainly experience wheezing, shortness of breath, and chest tightness, especially at night or when I’m active.
Sometimes I cough a lot, and these symptoms come and go — they can flare up suddenly, especially after exposure to triggers like dust, smoke, or cold air.
I’ve noticed my breathing gets worse in the mornings and after exercise.
I also have trouble smelling things, and I’ve had issues with nasal congestion and polyps in the past.
I’ve had reactions to aspirin and other NSAIDs — they’ve caused my breathing to worsen quickly, sometimes with hives or swelling.
